generic_rules: Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex in guarantees
Align helper declaration type with the expression in AGREE
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE scalar declaration types are int, real, and bool
Comparison expressions are bool; integer literals and integer arithmetic are int; real literals and real arithmetic are real
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in a component type annex
Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers, data types, or property references that are absent from the analyzed model and its configured dependencies
